Metadata.title: Shipping Hub — International parcel shipping & tracking
Metadata.description: Ship and track parcels between Panama, the United States and Latin America. Track any package with its tracking number — no account required.
Metadata.ogAlt: Shipping Hub — parcel shipping and tracking
Metadata.trackingDescription: Live status for shipment {code}: {status}, from {origin} to {destination}.

hero.title: Ship anywhere. Track everything.
hero.subtitle: Real-time parcel tracking and instant quotes across the Americas. Paste your tracking number — no sign-up needed.

tracking.title: Public tracking
tracking.description: Anyone can follow a shipment's journey with just the tracking number — rendered server-side, fast, and shareable.

coverage.title: Regional coverage
coverage.description: Domestic Panama plus express and economy lanes to the US and across Latin America.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.description: Volumetric-weight aware quotes with clear delivery estimates before you ship.

api.title: Developer friendly
api.description: A clean REST API with OpenAPI docs powers every tracking page on this site.

one.title: Create a shipment
one.description: Enter origin, destination and parcel details to generate a label and tracking number.

two.title: We move it
two.description: Operations scan the parcel at each hub, writing immutable tracking events.

three.title: Track in real time
three.description: Share the tracking link — recipients see every update in their language.

cta.title: Have a tracking number?
cta.subtitle: Check the status of any shipment in seconds.

search.title: Track your shipment
search.subtitle: Enter your tracking number to see the latest status and full history.
search.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid tracking number. Expected format: PTY-YYYY-NNNNNN-C.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that shipment
notFound.body: No shipment matches “{code}”. Double-check the number and try again.

Quote.title: Get an instant quote
Quote.subtitle: Estimate the price and delivery time for your parcel. Origin is Panama City.

result.title: Estimated quote
result.disclaimer: Estimate only. Final pricing is confirmed at checkout and will be powered by the pricing microservice in a later phase.

Coverage.title: Where we ship
Coverage.subtitle: Service levels and indicative transit times by destination zone. Origin is Panama.

LATAM.name: Latin America
LATAM.countries: Colombia, Mexico, Peru, Chile, Costa Rica, Argentina, Ecuador and more

Coverage.note: Transit times are business days and exclude customs delays and local holidays.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about tracking and shipping.

items.question: Do I need an account to track a package?
items.answer: No. Tracking is public — just enter your tracking number on the tracking page and you'll see the full history.

items.question: What does a tracking number look like?
items.answer: Tracking numbers follow the format PTY-YYYY-NNNNNN-C, where the last digit is a check digit that guards against typos.

items.question: How often is tracking updated?
items.answer: Every time operations scan your parcel at a facility, an immutable tracking event is recorded and appears instantly on the public page.

items.question: Which countries do you serve?
items.answer: We ship domestically within Panama and internationally to the United States and across Latin America. See the coverage page for details.

items.question: How is shipping priced?
items.answer: Pricing is based on destination zone, service level and billable weight (the greater of actual and volumetric weight).

items.question: Can I see a delivery estimate?
items.answer: Yes. Each shipment shows an estimated delivery date based on the selected service level and destination.

Footer.tagline: International parcel shipping & tracking across the Americas.
Footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Express and PostgreSQL.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
